prompt: cho codex xem các phương án này: Option 1: Dùng SQLite với WAL mode. Option 2: Dùng PostgreSQL với connection pooling. Option 3: Dùng Redis cache layer phía trước SQLite. Context: đang build hệ thống tracking cho 10000 concurrent users.
assertions: The command uses 'codex exec' (NOT 'codex exec review') since this is an options review, not a code review
The command includes all 3 options in the prompt (SQLite WAL, PostgreSQL pooling, Redis cache)
The prompt includes context about 10000 concurrent users
The command includes '-m gpt-5.4' to specify the correct model
The output contains Codex/GPT analysis evaluating the options
The agent presents the analysis with some framing or synthesis
